title: lepechinia aurifera
intro: Lepechinia aurifera, also known as Golden Pitcher Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, characterized by its showy yellow flowers and distinctive golden pitcher-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Lepechinia aurifera include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Lepechinia aurifera can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
